waiting_for: Pullback to bullish FVG zone (30073-30081) or EMA21 (30061) for long entry; breakout above 30100 for momentum continuation

long_assessment.reasoning: Strong uptrend intact (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Price has extended to 30091, 8 pts from 30100 resistance. A fresh bullish FVG formed at 30073.50-30081.25 creating a high-probability pullback zone. Placing a LIMIT order at the FVG top (30081.25) captures a trend-continuation entry. Stop at 30050 sits below EMA21 (30061) and EMA75 (30036) confluence with 10+ pt buffer. Target at 30150 (raw 30155, -5 buffer) targets the next resistance zone, yielding 2.2:1 R/R. Stochastic at 63.4 shows room for upside.

short_assessment.reasoning: The only structural short is a FVG_FILL into the bullish FVG below (target 30078.50). However, from current price (30091) the reward is only ~13 pts while a proper stop requires 40+ pts above 30100, giving ~0.3:1 R/R — well below the 1.3 minimum. The strong bullish EMA alignment and neutral stochastic (63) offer no counter-trend confluence. No viable short setup.
